reason: Browser-use feature allows agents to open browsers, navigate to URLs, and retrieve page information, returning correct results with "Example Domain" as requested.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent interface with three agents in the sidebar.

Found and clicked the "QA-20260423-173533-36zl" agent in the sidebar - Agent page opened successfully, displaying the message input interface with placeholder text "How can I help? Press cmd+enter to send".
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message was entered successfully in the input box and the send button became active.
Clicked the send button to send the message - Message was sent, agent status changed from "idle" to "working", and a session "Browser Page Title Lookup" was created.
Waited for response up to 3 minutes - Response returned within 6 seconds showing tool calls: "Open Browser" and "Browser Command $ get title", both with success checkmarks.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states: "The page title is **Example Domain**." The live browser preview on the right also displays the Example Domain website, confirming the browser tool worked correctly.
